---
title: "individual-training-responses-figure5"
format: html
editor: visual
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r}
#| label: Packages 

# Loading needed packages
source("./R/libs.R")


# Read the RDS files containing the data
## Test data
test_data_long <- readRDS(file = "data/derivedData/test_data_long")

test_data_wide <- readRDS(file = "data/derivedData/test_data_wide")


```

## Figure 5: Reproducibility of individual training responses

Creating a figure with 3 panels showing associations between individual change scores in period 1 and 2.

```{r}
#| label: Figure 5

# Saving sizes and widths of points and lines so easy to adjust
point.size = 1
line.width = 0.8
line.width.dashed = 0.3
axis.width = 0.5
text.size = 9
title.text.size = 9



# PO 15-min
fig.corr.watt.15tt <- test_data_long %>% 
  filter(variable == "watt.15tt") %>% 
  select(id, period, variable, change.pre.post) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = period,
              values_from = change.pre.post) %>% 
  select(id, "1", "2") %>%
  ggplot(., aes(x=`1`, y=`2`)) +
  
  geom_rect(aes(xmin=-Inf,xmax=Inf,ymin=-8.12,ymax=8.12), fill="aliceblue") + # Adding colure to 2xTE
  geom_rect(aes(xmin=-8.12,xmax=8.12,ymin=-Inf,ymax=Inf), fill="aliceblue") + # Adding colure to 2xTE
  
  geom_abline(intercept = 0, slope = 1, linetype = "dashed", linewidth=line.width.dashed,color = "navy") + 
  # Add perfect correlation line
  geom_point(size=point.size) +
  geom_smooth(method="lm", colour = "black", linewidth=line.width) +
  theme_pubr() +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-20, 80), breaks = seq(from = -20, to = 80, by = 20)) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-20, 80), breaks = seq(from = -20, to = 80, by = 20)) +
  labs(x = expression("ET"[1] ~ Delta ~ "MMPO"[15-min]*"  (W) "), 
       y = expression("ET"[2] ~ Delta ~ "MMPO"[15-min]*"  (W) ")) +
  theme(axis.line = element_line(linewidth = axis.width),  
        text = element_text(size = text.size))  
fig.corr.watt.15tt



# PO VO2max
fig.corr.watt.max <- test_data_long %>% 
  filter(variable == "watt.max") %>% 
  select(id, period, variable, change.pre.post) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = period,
              values_from = change.pre.post) %>% 
  select(id, "1", "2") %>%
  ggplot(., aes(x=`1`, y=`2`)) +
    
  geom_rect(aes(xmin=-Inf,xmax=Inf,ymin=-Inf,ymax=13.92), fill="aliceblue") + # Adding colure to 2xTE
  geom_rect(aes(xmin=-Inf,xmax=13.92,ymin=-Inf,ymax=Inf), fill="aliceblue") + # Adding colure to 2xTE
  
  geom_abline(intercept = 0, slope = 1, linetype = "dashed", linewidth=line.width.dashed, color = "navy") + 
  # Add perfect correlation line
  geom_point(size=point.size) +
  geom_smooth(method="lm", colour = "black", linewidth=line.width) +
  theme_pubr() +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-7, 80), breaks = seq(from = 0, to = 80, by = 25)) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-7, 80), breaks = seq(from = 0, to = 80, by = 25)) +
  labs(
  x = expression("ET"[1] ~ Delta ~ "MMPO"[dot(V) * O[2 * max]] * " (W)"), 
  y = expression("ET"[2] ~ Delta ~ "MMPO"[dot(V) * O[2 * max]] * " (W)")) +
  theme(axis.line = element_line(linewidth = axis.width),
        text = element_text(size = text.size))  
fig.corr.watt.max


# VO2max
fig.corr.vo2.max <- test_data_long %>% 
  filter(variable == "vo2.max") %>% 
  select(id, period, variable, change.pre.post) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = period,
              values_from = change.pre.post) %>% 
  select(id, "1", "2") %>%
  ggplot(., aes(x=`1`, y=`2`)) +
  
  geom_rect(aes(xmin=-Inf,xmax=Inf,ymin=-Inf,ymax=122.2), fill="aliceblue") + # Adding colure to 2xTE
  geom_rect(aes(xmin=-Inf,xmax=122.2,ymin=-Inf,ymax=Inf), fill="aliceblue") + # Adding colure to 2xTE
  
  geom_abline(intercept = 0, slope = 1, linetype = "dashed", linewidth=line.width.dashed,color = "navy") + # Add perfect correlation line
  geom_point(size=point.size) +
  geom_smooth(method="lm", colour = "black", linewidth=line.width) +
  theme_pubr() +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-50, 850), breaks = seq(from = 0, to = 850, by = 200)) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-50, 850), breaks = seq(from = 0, to = 850, by = 200)) +
   labs(
    x = expression("ET"[1] ~ Delta ~ dot(V) * O[2 * max] * "  (mL ∙ min"^-1 * ") "), 
    y = expression("ET"[2] ~ Delta ~ dot(V) * O[2 * max] * "  (mL ∙ min"^-1 * ") ")) +
  theme(axis.line = element_line(linewidth = axis.width),
        text = element_text(size = text.size))  
fig.corr.vo2.max



# Figure 3 A-C: MPOvo2max, MMPO15min, and VO2max
figure.5 <- plot_grid(fig.corr.watt.15tt, fig.corr.watt.max,fig.corr.vo2.max, 
                             ncol = 3, rel_widths = c(1, 1, 1), rel_heights = c(1, 1, 1)) +
  
  # Name panels
  draw_plot_label(x = c(0, 0.33, 0.66), 
                  y = c(0.99, 0.99, 0.99), 
                  label = c("A", "B", "C"), 
                  size = text.size) +

# Panel A
  draw_plot_label(x = 0.09, 
                y = c(0.97, 0.91),
                label = c("ICC = 0.20 [0.00, 0.37]", "r = 0.23 [-0.08, 0.50]"),
                size = 9,
                fontface = "plain",
                hjust = 0) +

  # Panel B
  draw_plot_label(x = 0.415,
                y = c(0.97, 0.91), 
                label = c("ICC = 0.32 [0.00, 0.45]", "r = 0.38 [0.08, 0.61]"), 
                size = 9,
                fontface = "plain",
                hjust = 0) +

  # Panel C
  draw_plot_label(x = 0.76, 
                y = c(0.97, 0.91), 
                label = c("ICC = 0.19 [0.00, 0.37] ", "r = 0.19 [-0.13, 0.46]"),
                size = 9,
                fontface = "plain",
                hjust = 0) 
figure.5 
  
  

# Determinants figure to pdf
saveRDS(figure.5, "./figures/rds/figure.5.RDS")

ggsave("figures/figure.5.png", plot = figure.5, width = 18, height = 6, 
       dpi = 800,
       units = "cm", device= png())


```
